title: Replace Gemini core agent with Antigravity
description: Put Antigravity on PATH and update the AI Command Center so the core agent set is Codex, Claude, and Antigravity instead of Gemini.
acceptance_criteria: antigravity and agy resolve on PATH
ai start launches Codex, Claude, and Antigravity
AI Command Center help and banner no longer list Gemini as a core command
Desktop command-center layout opens an Antigravity tab instead of Gemini
Agent Deck uses Antigravity instead of Gemini
